summary: Stripped all 83 decorative emoji glyphs (8 distinct glyphs) from docs/niri.md via mechanical Rule A/Rule B trims plus the gear-parenthetical special case (lines 86, 942). All 26 structural arrows and both ASCII-art box-drawing diagrams confirmed byte-for-byte intact. Grep verification: zero residual STRIP-glyph hits, no dangling parentheses, change scoped to docs/niri.md only.
decisions_made: Gear glyph parenthetical special case handled by deleting the whole ' (⚙️)' span (lines 86, 942) to avoid dangling '()'

All other 7 glyphs handled via two uniform trim rules: Rule A (glyph/run + trailing space deleted) and Rule B (preceding space + glyph deleted at line-final position, used only for line 5's heading trailer)
